title: filters (plural) on a GIN-indexed FK field returns the linked record
prompt: Do the following in order: (1) create an account with lastname "{recordPrefix}-{runId}" and firstname "FK" of type CUSTOMER (type enum: CUSTOMER=1) and currency "EUR" (accounts require a currency — the column is NOT NULL with no default); (2) create a ticket named "{recordPrefix}-{runId} fk" that is linked to that account via the ticket's `account` field; (3) confirm you can find that ticket again by listing tickets filtered on the `account` foreign key. Output a JSON object on the RESULT line with both IDs, e.g. `RESULT: {"accountId": 111, "ticketId": 222}`.
